ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., Denim, Casual Wear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing type (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the clothing type (e.g., t-shirts, jeans, skirts) */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric used for the clothing type (e.g., cotton, polyester, wool) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_size_standards" (
  "regional_size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional size standard */,
  "regional_size_standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the regional size standard (e.g., European, UK, US) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regional size standard */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the regional size standard is used */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the regional size standard is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_ranges" (
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size range */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "regional_size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Value of the size (e.g., 27-28, 34) */,
  "min_body_measurement" TEXT /* Minimum body measurement for the size range */,
  "max_body_measurement" TEXT /* Maximum body measurement for the size range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_regional_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_size_standard_id") REFERENCES regional_size_standards ("regional_size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size range */,
  "regional_size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional size standard to convert to */,
  "converted_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the converted size */,
  "converted_size_value" TEXT /* Value of the converted size */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate used for the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_regional_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_size_standard_id") REFERENCES regional_size_standards ("regional_size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_range_id") REFERENCES size_ranges ("size_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, customer service representative, designer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the inquiry */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "regional_size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was responded to */,
  "inquiry_status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., pending, responded, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_regional_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_size_standard_id") REFERENCES regional_size_standards ("regional_size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "regional_size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "design_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "fabric_requirement" TEXT /* Fabric requirement for the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_regional_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_size_standard_id") REFERENCES regional_size_standards ("regional_size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "regional_size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regional size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_regional_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_size_standard_id") REFERENCES regional_size_standards ("regional_size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
